response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5+ years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems as core daily work. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis, far short of the 8-year minimum. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or formal tech-lead mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) across diverse stacks with founder-level ownership
Distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby (millions of req/s) and Optilyz
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: Far below 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of professional C++ work
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud architecture leadership
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale
